title: Fresh Ores and Ingots
description: Give ingots, bricks, and ores a 3D makeover for a nicer, more detailed look.
body:
![Fresh Ores and Ingots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0eed71ac4c2fc16b4bbdcb7f095d0f19f748f1c0.png)
[![Discord Server](https://img.shields.io/discord/1371956415479939173?style=for-the-badge&logo=Discord&logoColor=white&label=Discord&color=728ADA)](https://discord.gg/YqKBQtWE9T) [![YouTube Channel Subscribers](https://img.shields.io/youtube/channel/subscribers/UCgbhEot28IcFLwTiArTJXeg?style=for-the-badge&logo=youtube&logoColor=white&label=Youtube&color=FF0034)](https://www.youtube.com/@swip) [![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/paf0m7bo?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&label=Modrinth&color=1CD96A)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-ores-and-ingots) [![GitHub followers](https://img.shields.io/github/followers/iamcyberia?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&label=Github)](https://github.com/iamcyberia)
![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/899c0e364c509449cd21d46c78cd5a7775ff9951.png) This resource pack gives all ores, ingots, bricks, and other minerals a fresh 3D look in the world while keeping their inventory sprites 2D. If you'd rather use the 3D version of those that's possible by using [RespackOpts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts)! ![Isometric view of all items in the resourcepack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9e74b0c74869443e40c90908b2e477ea528e53a.png) ## Nameable variants The pack also adds fun nameable variants like rubies, stacked ingots, and these fancy display cases

![All colours of the Dsiplay Cases](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54e901b4c795eb7a1b5d29ab59f2afe346545422.png) **_What are the renames?_** [![Item List](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a97c15f503729d779fc6f2f2a9eeec71ff7d2dd4_0.webp)](https://github.com/iamcyberia/fresh-ores-and-ingots/blob/main/README.md)
![Important](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6570fc1c8af37836ab6d9863e9b10a47862ff43.png)
Recommended Mods
Required Mods on 1.21.5 and below
![Upcoming Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8b6e383aea47901c3b3b0bc3cc4aed78bebacf7.png) More Nameable Variants.
![Extra](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af5cdff06b99e6c7ba21ae04072e98688dd2674b.png) Special thanks to [Braytonks](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/braysworld), who's not only excellent at making stuff, but also in explaining how to! Special thanks to [Hellay](https://modrinth.com/user/Hellay ) for making sprites and textures for some of the items Special thanks to [Weskerson](https://modrinth.com/user/weskerson) and [Dani](https://modrinth.com/user/tixork) for the core shaders! Last but not least I'd like to thank all testers in my Discord who helped me so much with feedback and finding bugs!
All My Testers [QuackingQuark](https://modrinth.com/user/QuackingQuark) [Capybaranamed2](https://modrinth.com/user/capybaranamed2) [ICE MASTER](https://modrinth.com/user/ICE_MASTER) [communist_lemon](https://modrinth.com/user/communist_lemon) [Achtari](https://modrinth.com/user/Achtari) [midvightmirage_](https://modrinth.com/user/midvightmirage_) [rjwaslive](https://modrinth.com/user/rjwaslive) [PhillWer](https://modrinth.com/user/PhillWer) [sudl](https://modrinth.com/user/sudl) [hours.wav](https://modrinth.com/user/devicestation4) RB Duckman Yousef [Prince Inah](https://modrinth.com/user/PrinceInah)
